CustomField.description: Minimum achievement % required on the prerequisite criteria. Works with Prerequisite_Criteria__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Minimum achievement percentage required on the Prerequisite Criteria for this criteria's incentive to be eligible. Default is 90%. Example: If Prerequisite is "Revenue" and Min % is 90, the salesperson must achieve at least 90% of their Revenue target to qualify for this criteria's incentive.
CustomField.label: Prerequisite Min Achievement (%)
